videos.headline: Isaiah Glasker snags pick-six for Cougars
videos.description: Isaiah Glasker intercepts the throw from Arizona quarterback Noah Fifita for a BYU touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Isaiah Glasker snags pick-six for Cougars) 2024/10/12 ESHEET

videos.headline: Montana Lemonious-Craig scores a TD for Arizona
videos.description: Montana Lemonious-Craig gets the Wildcats on the board first with a 14-yard receiving touchdown vs. the Cougars.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Montana Lemonious-Craig scores a TD for Arizona) 2024/10/12 ESHEET

videos.headline: Parker Kingston finds LJ Martin for a BYU TD
videos.description: Parker Kingston connects with LJ Martin on a 33-yard touchdown to give BYU the lead vs. Arizona.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Parker Kingston finds LJ Martin for a BYU TD) 2024/10/12 ESHEET

videos.headline: Chase Roberts catches a TD for BYU
videos.description: Chase Roberts extends the BYU lead with a short receiving touchdown in the third quarter vs. Arizona.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Chase Roberts catches a TD for BYU) 2024/10/12 ESHEET

videos.headline: Isaiah Glasker's sack leads to a BYU fumble recovery
videos.description: BYU's Isaiah Glasker sacks Arizona quarterback Noah Fifita in the third quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Isaiah Glasker's sack leads to a BYU fumble recovery) 2024/10/12 ESHEET

videos.headline: LJ Martin crosses goal line for a short rushing touchdown
videos.description: LJ Martin hustles into the end zone for the Cougars in the fourth quarter vs. the Wildcats.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (LJ Martin crosses goal line for a short rushing touchdown) 2024/10/12 ESHEET

videos.headline: Quali Conley sneaks into the end zone for Arizona
videos.description: Quali Conley dashes into the end zone for the Wildcats late in the fourth quarter vs. the Cougars.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Quali Conley sneaks into the end zone for Arizona) 2024/10/12 ESHEET
